series_metadata.series_title: Visitor Database to DAS Controlled Buildings
series_metadata.series_description: Electronic files containing dates and times when visitors enter select points of DAS owned or leased buildings, restricted floors and/or offices controlled by building access security system. Such files may contain visitor’s name and picture as retrieved from government-issued identification. Such files may also contain security risk information, some of which may be of long-term concern.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Visitor Information Retain in system for 30 days, then erase. Visitor Security Risk information Retain in system for 3 years then review and purge or retain for an additional 3 years, Electronic: Erase
